title: lithocarpus dolichostachys
intro: Lithocarpus dolichostachys, also known as the Chinese bur oak, is a species of tree in the beech family, Fagaceae. The bark and leaves of this plant have been used in traditional Chinese medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lithocarpus dolichostachys include reducing fever, relieving rheumatic pain, and promoting wound healing. The plant is prepared as an herbal tea or decoction, and its extracts have been used in various herbal preparations, including capsules and tinctures.
